Re-Notice Of Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions Of $6,160
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Anthony J. Sperber of Anthony Sperber Law Office 510-845-8844 appeared for Plaintiff Tara Winters. Atty. Michael A. Farbstein of Michael Farbstein Attorney at Law 650-554-6200 appeared for defendant Mission Housing Argued - The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TARA WINTERS Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions Of $6,160. Plaintiff's motion is granted and sanctions is denied. Defendant's responses contain objections that were already waived. Defendant mhdc shall serve verified further responses, without objection, within 10 days of service of the notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. (details see scanned order) Judge Pro Tem Melinda Derish, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions Of $6,160
Off Calendar Feb-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TARA WINTERS' Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions Of $6,160 is Continued to March 5, 2019 per amended motion filed on January 31, 2019. Judge Pro Tem Roger Mead, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
